Off Calendar Aug-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Roberto Marenco, 415-724-3886, for Pro Per Plaintiff
Mark D. Lipton, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-4218, for Defendant City and County of San Franciso,

Plaintiff did not properly contest the court's tentative ruling. Court allows argument.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argumentadopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

Defendant's motion to set aside default is granted. The "judicial review" plaintiff filed July 18, 2023 does not appear to oppose defendant's motion.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
